zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Huntingfield於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，她的父親Roger Huntingfield21歲，母親Joyce Engaine23歲。她於1299年與Sir Knight Richard Bassett結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1314年10月18日之前在英國素福爾可亨廷費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Huntingfield于大约1280年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可时，她的父亲Roger Huntingfield21岁，母亲Joyce Engaine23岁。她于1299年与Sir Knight Richard Bassett结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1314年10月18日之前在英国素福爾可亨廷費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Huntingfield was born about 1280, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger Huntingfield, was 21 and her mother, Joyce Engaine, was 23. She married Sir Knight Richard Bassett in 1299. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died before 18 October 1314, in Huntingfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Huntingfield est née environ 1280, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger Huntingfield, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joyce Engaine, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Knight Richard Bassett en 1299. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée avant 18 octobre 1314, à Huntingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Huntingfield um 1280 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Huntingfield 21 und ihre Mutter Joyce Engaine 23. Sie hat 1299 Sir Knight Richard Bassett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb vor 18. Oktober 1314 in Huntingfield, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Huntingfield è nata il circa 1280 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger Huntingfield, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Joyce Engaine, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Knight Richard Bassett nel 1299. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 18 ottobre 1314, nel Huntingfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Huntingfieldが約1280年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Roger Huntingfieldは21歳，母Joyce Engaineは23歳であった。1299年にSir Knight Richard Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1314年10月18日以前にイギリススフォルクハンティングフィールドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Huntingfield(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Huntingfield(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joyce Engaine(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1299년 Sir Knight Richard Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1314년 10월 18일 이전 영국 수폴크 헌틴그필드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Huntingfield nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger Huntingfield, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joyce Engaine, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Knight Richard Bassett em 1299. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu antes 18 de outubro de 1314, em Huntingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Huntingfield родилась около 1280 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger Huntingfield было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joyce Engaine, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Knight Richard Bassett в 1299 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла перед 18 октябрь 1314 г. в местности хантингфиелд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Huntingfield nació aproximadamente 1280, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Huntingfield, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joyce Engaine, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Knight Richard Bassett en 1299. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió antes de 18 de octubre de 1314, en Huntingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
